rationale: Keep because the cited paper appears plausibly theoretical/mechanistic for the citing paper: both notes emphasize mental accounting and how transaction framing/coupling versus separation changes behavior (cited: transaction decoupling from price bundling; citing: trade-in vs separate transactions affecting WTP via perceived transaction importance). The citing paper’s own implication about treating trade-in and purchase as separate transactions aligns closely with the cited paper’s core construct, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
